title: Minfluence
description: Mi Alliance Overhaul that greatly improves the PVP experience as well as various other bug fixes and new content!
body:
Minfluence focuses mainly on overhauling certain aspects of Mi Alliance

## Configs

- Disable relicoid block breaking
- Disable mi block breaking
- Give relicoids a lifespan
- Enable/disable player or alliance colonies
- Enable/disable mi suffocation or fall damage
- Fixing mi friendly fire
- Disabling mi building

## Overhauls

- PvP is improved greatly with the new declaration system allowing for convient pvp through the use of a gui
- Mis are now able to fight players while their owner is offline
- Mis no longer friendly fire their owner and other mis at peace with the friendly fire fix config on

## Features

- A vanity system to give your mis their own outfits, a total of 6 outfits so far, can be mixed and matched with a max of 6 total capacity slots for outfits!
- Enchantment recruits let you enchant your mis' weapons at the cost of your own exp, "stronger" mis will cost more levels!
- Elite officer recruit, the normal officer recruit is now limited to mis, goobs, commandos, and tonks, any other mi type will need the elite officer recruit, additionally the elite officer recruit gives plus 3 levels if given to a mi, goob, commando or tonk.
- Mi Patrol points! Your mis will be able to traverse these patrol points and set up a network of patrolling mis for defense!
- Orders now display mis that match its state as well as where the order is linked to!
